proteins: sofritas (organic braised tofu, chipotle, roasted poblano)
chicken al pastor (LTO — pineapple, achiote, chipotle)
salsas: fresh tomato salsa (mild — tomato, onion, cilantro, lemon, lime)
corn salsa (mild — corn, poblano, red onion, jalapeño, lime)
tomatillo green chili salsa (medium — tomatillo, jalapeño, cilantro)
tomatillo red chili salsa (hot — dried red chili, chipotle, tomato)
tomatillo red chili salsa extra hot (habanero)
toppings: guacamole (avocado, lime, cilantro, red onion, jalapeño)
queso blanco (white cheese, tomatillo, jalapeño, poblano)
